steps.description: Analysis and normalization were performed using two methods: dChip 1.3 (Li and Wong, 2001) and Drop Method (Aimone and Gage, 2004) software packages.

raw_text: Analysis and normalization were performed using two methods: dChip 1.3 (Li and Wong, 2001) and Drop Method (Aimone and Gage, 2004) software packages.
